narrative:
Lanier Township has 2,446 registered voters, with 51.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.4 percentage points.
